theme: How to choose the right destination for your corporate event

linkedin.text:
How to choose the right destination for your corporate event. A framework.

After 200+ events in 20+ countries, here's the decision tree we use with every new client:

Step 1 — Define the objective
Is this a reward trip (best performers only)? A team-building event (everyone included)? A conference with leisure components? The destination criteria change based on purpose.

Step 2 — Set the real budget
Not "what do you want to spend" — "what is each person's total trip worth to you?" Flights, hotel, food, activities, production. Work backwards from value, not cost.

Step 3 — Match destination to brand
Luxury brand → Monaco, Amalfi, Portofino.
Tech company → Berlin, Copenhagen, Amsterdam.
Family-oriented culture → Barcelona, Lisbon, Seville.
Adventure-focused → Iceland, Morocco, Oman.

Step 4 — Check logistics viability
Flight time from Israel: Under 4h = ideal. 4-6h = acceptable. 6h+ = needs strong justification.
Visa requirements: EU is open. Others need lead time.
Season: Check weather and local events (avoid school holidays for European venues).

Step 5 — Validate with past groups
We always share anonymized feedback from similar groups in the same destination. A 9.4 satisfaction score from a 60-person pharma group in Florence means more than any brochure.

The right destination isn't the most beautiful place. It's the place that best serves your specific group's purpose.

What's your process for choosing destinations? I'd love to hear.

#CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #IncentiveTravel #Destinations #HRLeadership #EventStrategy #UproductionEvents #MICE #EventProduction #CorporateTravel #TeamBuilding

instagram.text:
How to pick the perfect corporate event destination 🗺️

Our 5-step framework after 200+ events:

1️⃣ Define the objective (reward vs. team building)
2️⃣ Set the real budget (per person total value)
3️⃣ Match destination to brand culture
4️⃣ Check logistics (flight time, visas, season)
5️⃣ Validate with past group data

The right destination serves your group's purpose — not just looks great on Instagram 😉

Which step do you start with? 👇

#CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #IncentiveTravel #EventStrategy #UproductionEvents #MICE #CorporateTravel
